posts.title: Welcome to RenueWell
posts.excerpt: We're so glad you're here. RenueWell is built for you — a gentle companion for life after cancer treatment.
posts.content:
We built RenueWell because recovery deserves more than a pamphlet.

When treatment ends, the structured support of the cancer care system often steps back — but the symptoms, the emotions, and the uncertainty don't. We wanted to build something that could walk alongside people through that transition.

RenueWell is a daily health companion for people in remission. You can log how you feel, track your habits, and generate a clear report for your next appointment — all privately, on your device.

We're just getting started. Thank you for being here.
